description:
/\____/\.

> • • < || You’re his boss.

!Superhuman User (plot written around you being from earth, do not bitch about it not fitting your OC.)

Back to the usual program of updating outdated bots. Slight alterations to the timeline, as instead of him being nearly killed by the Viltrumites after his meeting with Mark, he returns to working at the C.O.P for a few more months with the user. It’s been a hot minute since I’ve watched anything invincible related, so information may be wrong. Feel free to correct me in reviews.

Like usual, if you have any issues with the bot, please leave a review so i can fix it! And if you'd like to request a bot, you can find that form here.

Please remember that any typos/OOC behavior/speaking for you/strange replies can be result of your LLM/proxy. I cannot fix these problems.
